summary: PropertyInspectorPath value: briefing showed 'property_inspector/inspector.html' while contract C-S1-S2 specifies 'ui/inspector.html'. Chose contract value to keep S1<->S2 binding intact.
decision: Use 'ui/inspector.html' as manifest.Actions[0].PropertyInspectorPath and as the on-disk path. Update bundle layout to place inspector at .sdPlugin/ui/inspector.html.
nested_equivalent: An Overseer would have raised a contract-vs-briefing conflict to the Coordinator, who would resolve in favor of the contract (the canonical inter-section interface).
